fullArticle:
All products featured here are independently selected by our editors and writers. If you buy something through links on our site, Gizmodo may earn an affiliate commission.

Google’s next Pixel Watch could inch the company’s wearables up to Apple’s premium price range. According to leaked details from Dealabs, the upcoming Pixel Watch 5 will start at $400 for its entry-level 41mm Bluetooth / Wi-Fi model, a $50 increase over the $350 Google has charged since the first Pixel Watch launched in 2022.

Pixel Watches have technically been sold at several different prices since the beginning. Cellular connectivity has come with an added cost, for example, starting at $50 more for the Pixel Watch and Pixel Watch 2, and jumping to $100 more for the Pixel Watch 3 and Pixel Watch 4.
